text.easyauth.loginRequired:
§cYou are not authenticated!
§6Use /login or /l to authenticate.
text.easyauth.loginTriesExceeded: §4Too many login attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
text.easyauth.maxPasswordChars: §6Password can be at most %d characters long!
text.easyauth.minPasswordChars: §6Password must be at least %d characters long!
text.easyauth.worldSpawnSet: §aLogin spawn point has been set successfully.
text.easyauth.corruptedPlayerData: §cYour data may be corrupted. Please contact an administrator.
text.easyauth.offlineUuid:
Offline UUID for player %s (click to copy):
%s
text.easyauth.validSession: §aYou have a valid session. No need to log in.
text.easyauth.onlinePlayerLogin: §aYou are using an online account. No need to log in.
text.easyauth.differentUsernameCase: §6You are using a different case for your username. Please use the correct one.
text.easyauth.selfMarkAsOnline: §aYou have marked yourself as an online player.
text.easyauth.selfMarkAsOnlineWarning:
§6You are about to mark yourself as an online player.
§6You will not be able to log in unless you have an online account.
§6All data linked to the offline UUID (like villagers' discounts, pets) will be lost.
§aTo proceed, type /account online <password> true.
text.easyauth.accountCheckFailed: §cMojang server is unavailable. Please try again later.
